title: Bestway Xtreme Swim Ring
features: Cool flame print graphics (4 assorted colours)
description: Product Description The Bestway 91cm Xtreme Inflatable Pool Ring features some radically colourful flame graphics (befitting its Xtreme nature). Available in 4 assorted colours the swim ring is as at home being used to lounge in the pool as it is shooting down the slides at a water park! Heavy duty handles help maintain purchase even when wet and slippery from water. Made from durable vinyl and comes with a repair patch in the unlikely event of a puncture. Adult supervision recommended at all times when children are using pools System Requirements continuity 2014
